title: CSX and SMART-TD Partner to Deliver Enhanced Conductor Training with Additional Week of Hands-on Experience
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., July 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) and the International Association of Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers — Transportation Division (SMART-TD) announced they are partnering to extend CSX's conductor training program to five weeks from the previous four-week regimen to provide new hires with additional hands-on experience prior to beginning on-the-job training (OJT).

title: CSX Announces 54 Chemical Safety Excellence Award Winners for 2022
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., July 27, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced the winners of the company's 29th annual Chemical Safety Excellence Awards recognizing customers for their outstanding contribution to the safe transportation of hazardous materials.

title: CSX Commits $10 Million Donation to the University of Florida Graduate Center Project in Jacksonville
text: Historic Investment Reinforces CSX's Dedication to Serving its Hometown Community Historic Investment Reinforces CSX's Dedication to Serving its Hometown Community

title: CSX Corporation: Officially Slowing Down
text: CSX Corporation has seen volume declines accelerate in the second quarter, but lost pricing power as well. This hurts earnings, which are now coming down, and will be pressured by emerging higher interest expenses as well. Earnings per share growth largely comes to a standstill, but at $2 per share provides quite some support.

title: CSX Q2 Earnings In Line With Estimates, Revenues Fall Short
text: CSX's second-quarter 2023 revenues are hurt by lower fuel prices, reduced supplemental revenue, a decline in export coal benchmark prices and a decrease in intermodal volumes.

title: CSX Shares Fall After Q2 Revenue Misses Expectations as Shipping Volumes Drop
text: Shares of railroad operator CSX fell after missing revenue estimates as intermodal shipping volumes dropped.

title: Markets Gain at Midday, Head for Winning Week on Earnings News
text: U.S. equities were up at midday on Friday, July 21, 2023 and on track for a winning week, powered by strong earnings news.

title: A Trucker's Stock Is Up, a Railroad Stock Is Down. They Delivered the Same Message.
text: Trucker Knight-Swift Transportation and railroad operator CSX reported second-quarter numbers late Thursday. The stocks are going in opposite directions on Friday, but the message both delivered about the economy was the same.

title: 2 Logistics Stocks in Focus After Earnings
text: Logistics stocks CSX Corporation   (NASDAQ:CSX) and Knight-Swift Transportation Holdings Inc (NYSE:KNX) are moving in opposite directions today, after the two companies' second-quarter earnings reports.

title: Did CSX Corporation's Rebound Just Go Off The Rails?
text: CSX Corporation NASDAQ: CSX stock has been trying hard to get off a technical bottom, and the recovery might have gone off the rails. The Q2 results were less than expected and caused shares prices to tank nearly 5%.

title: CSX reports 2Q revenue miss as volumes decline
text: CSX Corporation (NYSE:CSX) shares were set to open lower on Friday after the transportation company posted revenue that fell short of expectations after the closing bell on Thursday.  The Jacksonville, Florida-based company said lower fuel prices, reduced supplemental revenue, a decline in export coal benchmark prices, and a decrease in intermodal volumes more than offset the effects of volume growth in coal and merchandise and solid gains in merchandise pricing.

title: 5 Things to Know Before Markets Open
text: Big Tech firms including Amazon, Alphabet, Meta, and Microsoft agreed to AI safeguards brokered by the White House and shares of railroad operator CSX fell after it missed on revenue projections. Here's what investors need to know today.

title: CSX shares come off the rails while Peloton goes up a gear, and other early Friday movers
text: Peloton Interactive shares topped a gently upbeat leaderboard early Friday, gaining nearly 4% on decent premarket volume. The fitness group is due to publish earnings next month as management strives to revive the former lockdown darling.

text: CSX (CSX) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.49 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $0.50 per share a year ago.

text: Markets were mostly lower, although the Dow gained ground. CSX stock fell as the railroad industry faced some challenges.

title: CSX shares drop as falling coal, fuel prices hit sales
text: CSX Corp. shares fell after hours Thursday after the railroad operator reported second-quarter sales that missed expectations, dragged by lower fuel and coal prices and weaker shipping volumes.

title: CSX Corp. Announces Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., July 20, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced second quarter 2023 operating income of $1.48 billion compared to $1.70 billion in the prior year period. Net earnings of $996 million, or $0.49 per diluted share, compared to $1.18 billion, or $0.54 per diluted share, in the same period last year. Second quarter 2022 results included a $122 million gain ($0.04/share after-tax) related to the Commonwealth of Virginia property sale agreement.

title: The nation's biggest banks are gearing up for more consumer struggles ahead
text: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Chief Executive Jamie Dimon on Friday said the U.S. economy was basically doing OK, even if customers were spending “a little more slowly.”

title: CSX Adds Eight Rail-served Properties in Seven States to Select Site Program
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., July 14, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) has announced its latest group of high-ranking properties to receive CSX Select Site designation under the newly expanded industrial development program. Eight sites in seven states have earned a Gold, Silver or Bronze rating based on an evaluation of a wide range of site characteristics.

title: CSX Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Higher coal revenues are likely to aid CSX's second-quarter 2023 results.

title: Daily Dividend Report: Walgreens Boots Alliance, CSX, Phillips 66, Ryder System, Albertsons
text: Walgreens Boots Alliance today announced that its board of directors has declared a quarterly dividend of 48 cents per share, unchanged from the previous quarter. The dividend is payable on Sept. 12, 2023, to stockholders of record as of Aug. 21, 2023. Walgreens Boots Alliance and its predecessor company, Walgreen, have paid a dividend in 363 straight quarters or more than 90 years.

title: Earnings Preview: CSX (CSX) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: CSX (CSX) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: CSX's Top Line To Decline In Q2?
text: Earnings will likely come in at about $0.49 per share, in line with the consensus estimate.

title: CSX Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., July 12, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) announced that the Company's Board of Directors approved a $0.11 per share quarterly dividend on the Company's common stock. The dividend is payable on September 15, 2023, to shareholders of record at the close of business on August 31, 2023.

title: CSX Releases 2022 Environmental, Social and Governance Report
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., July 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) announced the release of its 2022 Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Report highlighting significant progress the company has made towards advancing its workforce and improving environmental stewardship, social responsibility and governance best practices over the past year.
